title: Tao Te Ching 78
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 78 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 78 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Nothing in the world is softer and weaker than water. Yet nothing is better at attacking the hard and strong.
